title: The Strawberry Roan
writer: Julian Zimet, Dwight Cummins, Dorothy Yost
plot: Young Joe is paralyzed as he is bucked by a wild horse, a strawberry roan. Angered, his father, Walt, tries to shoot the horse but is stopped by his foreman, Gene Autry. The roan escapes and Autry, told to leave the ranch by Walt,...
